extraction.one_line_summary: DAINESE Alberto won bunch sprint after Dresdesbont caught under 1km, was DSM backup sprinter given free card when Kisboul felt ill.
tactical_patterns: Carapaz took 3-second bonus at sprint 75km out, moved GC to 2nd showing pink jersey tactics without attacking.
Dresdesbont solo held 1:30 gap until final 5km when leadouts hesitated to commit early, caught under 1km.
DSM freed backup sprinter Dainese when primary option Kisboul unwell, no structured leadout but Baldi positioned him perfectly.

rider_signals.GAVIRIA Fernando: negative: followed wrong wheels despite team leadout from Maxi, lacked positioning instinct for stage he won 2017
rider_signals.CAVENDISH Mark: negative: outside top 5 on flat sprint, Quick-Step animated race but delivered nothing for Cavs
rider_signals.YATES Simon: negative: caught in early splits with Carthy, UAE/Ineos vulnerable to crosswind positioning on flat stages
rider_signals.DAINESE Alberto: positive: first WorldTour win as backup option, reads final 200m better than established sprinters
